name: ABS
description: Calculates the absolute value of the specified value.

name: ACCRINT
description: Calculates the accrued interest for a security that pays periodic interest.

name: ACCRINTM
description: Calculates the accrued interest at maturity for a security that pays periodic interest.

name: ACOS
description: Calculates the arccosine, that is, the angle whose cosine is the specified value.

name: ACOSH
description: Calculates the inverse hyperbolic cosine of the specified value.

name: ADDRESS
description: Creates a cell address in text using the row and column numbers.

name: AMORDEGRC
description: Returns the depreciation for an accounting period, taking into consideration prorated depreciation, and applies a depreciation coefficient in the calculation based on the life of the assets.

name: AMORLINC
description: Calculates the depreciation for an accounting period, taking into account prorated depreciation.

name: AND
description: Checks whether all argumengts are True,and returns True if all argements are True.

name: ASIN
description: Calculates the arcsine, that is, the angle whose sine is the specified value.

name: ASINH
description: Calculates the inverse hyperbolic sine of a number.

name: ATAN
description: Calculates the arctangent, that is, the angle whose tangent is the specified value.

name: ATAN2
description: Calculates the arctangent of the specified x- and y-coordinates.

name: ATANH
description: Calculates the inverse hyperbolic tangent of a number.

name: AVEDEV
description: Calculates the average of the absolute deviations of the specified values from their mean.

name: AVERAGE
description: Calculates the average of the specified numeric values.

name: AVERAGEA
description: Calculates the average of the specified values, including text or logical values as well as numeric values.

name: AVERAGEIF
description: Calculates the average of the specified numeric values provided that they meet the specified criteria.

name: AVERAGEIFS
description: Calculates the average of all cells that meet multiple specified criteria.

name: BESSELI
description: Calculates the modified Bessel function of the first kind evaluated for purely imaginary arguments.

name: BESSELJ
description: Calculates the Bessel function of the first kind.

name: BESSELK
description: Calculates the modified Bessel function of the second kind evaluated for purely imaginary arguments.

name: BESSELY
description: Calculates the Bessel function of the second kind.

name: BETADIST
description: Calculates the cumulative beta distribution function.

name: BETAINV
description: Calculates the inverse of the cumulative beta distribution function.

name: BIN2DEC
description: Converts a binary number to a decimal number

name: BIN2HEX
description: Converts a binary number to a hexadecimal number.

name: BIN2OCT
description: Converts a binary number to an octal number.

name: BINOMDIST
description: Calculates the individual term binomial distribution probability.

name: CEILING
description: Rounds a number up to the nearest multiple of a specified value.

name: CHAR
description: Returns the character specified by a number.

name: CHIDIST
description: Calculates the one-tailed probability of the chi-squared distribution.

name: CHIINV
description: Calculates the inverse of the one-tailed probability of the chi-squared distribution

name: CHITEST
description: Calculates the test for independence from the chi-squared distribution.

name: CHOOSE
description: Returns a value from a list of values.

name: CLEAN
description: Removes all non-printable characters from text.

name: CODE
description: Returns a numeric code to represent the first character in a text string. The returned code corresponds to the Windows character set (ANSI).

name: COLUMN
description: Returns the column number of a reference.

name: COLUMNS
description: Returns the number of columns in an array.

name: COMBIN
description: Calculates the number of possible combinations for a specified number of items.

name: COMPLEX
description: Converts real and imaginary coefficients into a complex number.

name: CONCATENATE
description: Combines multiple text strings or numbers into one text string.

name: CONFIDENCE
description: Returns confidence interval for a population mean.

name: CONVERT
description: Converts a number from one measurement system to its equivalent in another measurement system.

name: CORREL
description: Returns the correlation coefficient of the two sets of data.

name: COS
description: Returns the cosine of the specified angle.

name: COSH
description: Returns the hyperbolic cosine of the specified value.

name: COUNT
description: Returns the number of cells that contain numbers.

name: COUNTA
description: Returns the number of number of cells that contain numbers, text, or logical values.

name: COUNTBLANK
description: Returns the number of empty (or blank) cells in a range of cells on a sheet.

name: COUNTIF
description: Returns the number of cells that meet a certain condition

name: COUNTIFS
description: Returns the number of cells that meet multiple conditions.

name: COUPDAYBS
description: Calculates the number of days from the beginning of the coupon period to the settlement date.

name: COUPDAYS
description: Returns the number of days in the coupon period that contains the settlement date.

name: COUPDAYSNC
description: Calculates the number of days from the settlement date to the next coupon date.

name: COUPNCD
description: Returns a date number of the next coupon date after the settlement date.

name: COUPNUM
description: Returns the number of coupons due between the settlement date and maturity date.

name: COUPPCD
description: Returns a date number of the previous coupon date before the settlement date.

name: COVAR
description: Returns the covariance, which is the average of the products of deviations for each data point pair in two sets of numbers.

name: CRITBINOM
description: Returns the criterion binomial, the smallest value for which the cumulative binomial distribution is greater than or equal to a criterion value.

name: CUMIPMT
description: Returns the cumulative interest paid on a loan between start_period and end_period.
parameters: rate, nper, pv, start_period, end_period, type

name: CUMPRINC
description: Returns the cumulative principal paid on a loan between start_period and end_period.
parameters: rate, nper, pv, start_period, end_period, type

name: DATE
description: Returns the serial date value for a particular date, specified by the year, month, and day.

name: DATEDIF
description: Returns the number of days, months, or years between two dates.

name: DATEVALUE
description: Returns the serial number of a date entered as text.

name: DAVERAGE
description: Calculates the average of values in a column of a list or database that match the specified conditions.

name: DAY
description: Returns the day number of the month (integer 1 to 31) that corresponds to the specified date.

name: DAYS360
description: Returns the number of days between two dates based on a 360-day year.

name: DB
description: Calculates the depreciation of an asset for a specified period using the fixed-declining balance method

name: DCOUNT
description: Counts the cells that contain numbers in a column of a list or database that match the specified conditions

name: DCOUNTA
description: Counts the non-blank cells in a column of a list or database that match the specified conditions

name: DDB
description: Calculates the depreciation of an asset for a specified period using the double-declining balance method or another method you specify.

name: DEC2BIN
description: Converts a decimal number to a binary number.

name: DEC2HEX
description: Converts a decimal number to a hexadecimal number

name: DEC2OCT
description: Converts a decimal number to an octal number

name: DEGREES
description: Converts the specified value from radians to degrees

name: DELTA
description: Identifies whether two values are equal. Returns 1 if they are equal; returns 0 otherwise.

name: DEVSQ
description: Calculates the sum of the squares of deviations of data points (or of an array of data points) from their sample mean.

name: DGET
description: Extracts a single value from a column of a list or database that matches the specified conditions.

name: DISC
description: Calculates the discount rate for a security.

name: DMAX
description: Returns the largest number in a column of a list or database that matches the specified conditions.

name: DMIN
description: Returns the smallest number in a column of a list or database that matches the specified conditions.

name: DOLLAR
description: Converts a number to text using currency format, with the decimals rounded to the specified place.

name: DOLLARDE
description: Converts a fraction dollar price to a decimal dollar price.

name: DOLLARFR
description: Converts a decimal number dollar price to a fraction dollar price.

name: DPRODUCT
description: Multiplies the values in a column of a list or database that match the specified conditions.

name: DSTDEV
description: Estimates the standard deviation of a population based on a sample by using the numbers in a column of a list or database that match the specified conditions.

name: DSTDEVP
description: Calculates the standard deviation of a population based on the entire population using the numbers in a column of a list or database that match the specified conditions.

name: DSUM
description: Adds the numbers in a column of a list or database that match the specified conditions.

name: DURATION
description: Returns the Macauley duration for an assumed par value of $100.

name: DVAR
description: Estimates the variance of a population based on a sample by using the numbers in a column of a list or database that match the specified conditions.

name: DVARP
description: Calculates the variance of a population based on the entire population by using the numbers in a column of a list or database that match the specified conditions.

name: EDATE
description: Calculates the date that is the indicated number of months before or after a specified date.

name: EFFECT
description: Calculates the effective annual interest rate for a given nominal annual interest rate and the number of compounding periods per year.

name: EOMONTH
description: Calculates the last day of the month (end of month) that is the indicated number of months before or after the starting date. Typically, it is used to evaluate expiry dates, due dates and other dates that are supposed to land at the end of a month.

name: ERF
description: Calculates the error function integrated between a lower and an upper limit.

name: ERFC
description: Calculates the complementary error function integrated between a lower limit and infinity.

name: ERROR.TYPE
description: Returns a number corresponding to one of the error values.

name: EURO
description: Returns the equivalent of one Euro based on the ISO currency code.

name: EUROCONVERT
description: Converts currency from a Euro member currency (including Euros) to another Euro member currency (including Euros).

name: EVEN
description: Rounds the specified value up to the nearest even integer.

name: EXACT
description: Returns true if two strings are the same; otherwise, false.

name: EXP
description: Returns e raised to the power of the specified value.

name: EXPONDIST
description: Returns the exponential distribution or the probability density

name: FACT
description: Calculates the factorial of the specified number.

name: FACTDOUBLE
description: Calculates the double factorial of the specified number.

name: FALSE
description: Returns the value for logical FALSE.

name: FDIST
description: Calculates the F probability distribution, to see degrees of diversity between two sets of data.

name: FIND
description: Finds one text value within another and returns the text value’s position in the text you searched.

name: FINV
description: Returns the inverse of the F probability distribution.

name: FISHER
description: Returns the Fisher transformation for a specified value

name: FISHERINV
description: Returns the inverse of the Fisher transformation for a specified value.

name: FIXED
description: Rounds a number to the specified number of decimal places, formats the number in decimal format using a period and commas (if so specified), and returns the result as text.

name: FLOOR
description: Rounds a number down to the nearest multiple of a specified value.

name: FORECAST
description: Calculates a future value using existing values.

name: FREQUENCY
description: Calculates how often values occur within a range of values. Returns a vertical array of numbers

name: FTEST
description: Returns the result of an F-test, which returns the one-tailed probability that the variances in two arrays are not significantly different.

name: FV
description: Returns the future value of an investment based on a present value, periodic payments, and a specified interest rate.

name: FVSCHEDULE
description: Returns the future value of an initial principal after applying a series of compound interest rates. Calculate future value of an investment with a variable or adjustable rate.

name: GAMMADIST
description: Returns the gamma distribution.

name: GAMMAINV
description: Returns the inverse of the gamma cumulative distribution.

name: GAMMALN
description: Returns the natural logarithm of the Gamma function, G(x).

name: GCD
description: Returns the greatest common divisor of two numbers.

name: GEOMEAN
description: Returns the geometric mean of a set of positive data.

name: GESTEP
description: Greater Than Or Equal To Step. Returns an indication of whether a number is equal to a threshold.

name: GROWTH
description: Calculates predicted exponential growth. Returns the y values for a series of new x values that are specified by using existing x and y values.

name: HARMEAN
description: Returns the harmonic mean of a data set.

name: HEX2BIN
description: Converts a hexadecimal number to a binary number.

name: HEX2DEC
description: Converts a hexadecimal number to a decimal number.

name: HEX2OCT
description: Converts a hexadecimal number to an octal number.

name: HLOOKUP
description: Searches for a value in the top row and then returns a value in the same column from a specified row.

name: HOUR
description: Returns the hour that corresponds to a specified time.

name: HYPGEOMDIST
description: Returns the hypergeometric distribution.

name: IF
description: Performs a comparison and returns one of two provided values based on that comparison.

name: IFERROR
description: Evaluates a formula and returns a value you provide if there is an error or the formula result.

name: IMABS
description: Returns the absolute value or modulus of a complex number.

name: IMAGINARY
description: Returns the imaginary coefficient of a complex number.

name: IMARGUMENT
description: Returns the argument theta, which is an angle expressed in radians.

name: IMCONJUGATE
description: Returns the complex conjugate of a complex number.

name: IMCOS
description: Returns the cosine of a complex number.

name: IMDIV
description: Returns the quotient of two complex numbers.

name: IMEXP
description: Returns the exponential of a complex number.

name: IMLN
description: Returns the natural logarithm of a complex number.

name: IMLOG10
description: Returns the common logarithm of a complex number.

name: IMLOG2
description: Returns the base-2 logarithm of a complex number.

name: IMPOWER
description: Returns a complex number raised to a power.

name: IMPRODUCT
description: Returns the product of up to 29 complex numbers in the x+yi or x+yj text format

name: IMREAL
description: Returns the real coefficient of a complex number in the x+yi or x+yj text format.

name: IMSIN
description: Returns the sine of a complex number in the x+yi or x+yj text format.

name: IMSQRT
description: Returns the square root of a complex number in the x+yi or x+yj text format.

name: IMSUB
description: Returns the difference of two complex numbers in the x+yi or x+yj text format.

name: IMSUM
description: Returns the sum of two or more complex numbers in the x+yi or x+yj text format.

name: INDEX
description: Returns a value or the reference to a value from within an array or range.

name: INT
description: Rounds a specified number down to the nearest integer.

name: INTERCEPT
description: Returns the coordinates of a point at which a line intersects the y-axis, by using existing x values and y values.

name: INTRATE
description: Calculates the interest rate for a fully invested security.

name: IPMT
description: Calculates the payment of interest on a loan.

name: IRR
description: Returns the internal rate of return for a series of cash flows represented by the numbers in an array.

name: ISBLANK
description: Tests whether a value, an expression, or contents of a referenced cell is empty.

name: ISERR
description: Is Error Other Than Not Available. Tests whether a value, an expression, or contents of a referenced cell has an error other than not available (#N/A).

name: ISERROR
description: Is Error of Any Kind. Tests whether a value, an expression, or contents of a referenced cell has an error of any kind.

name: ISEVEN
description: Is Number Even. Tests whether a value, an expression, or contents of a referenced cell is even.

name: ISLOGICAL
description: Tests whether a value, an expression, or contents of a referenced cell is a logical (Boolean) value.

name: ISNA
description: Is Not Available. Tests whether a value, an expression, or contents of a referenced cell has the not available (#N/A) error value.

name: ISNONTEXT
description: Tests whether a value, an expression, or contents of a referenced cell has any data type other than text.

name: ISNUMBER
description: Tests whether a value, an expression, or contents of a referenced cell has numeric data.

name: ISODD
description: Is Number Odd. Tests whether a value, an expression, or contents of a referenced cell has numeric data.

name: ISPMT
description: Calculates the interest paid during a specific period of an investment.

name: ISREF
description: Is Reference. Tests whether a value, an expression, or contents of a referenced cell is a reference to another cell.

name: ISTEXT
description: Tests whether a value, an expression, or contents of a referenced cell has text data.

name: KURT
description: Returns the kurtosis of a data set.

name: LARGE
description: Returns the nth largest value in a data set, where n is specified.

name: LCM
description: Returns the least common multiple of two numbers.

name: LEFT
description: Returns the specified leftmost characters from a text value.

name: LEN
description: Returns the length of, the number of characters in, a text string.

name: LINEST
description: Calculates the statistics for a line.

name: LN
description: Returns the natural logarithm of the specified number.

name: LOG
description: Returns the logarithm base Y of a number X.

name: LOG10
description: Returns the logarithm base 10 of the number given.

name: LOGEST
description: Calculates an exponential curve that fits the data and returns an array of values that describes the curve.

name: LOGINV
description: Returns the inverse of the lognormal cumulative distribution function of x, where LN(x) is normally distributed with the specified mean and standard deviation.

name: LOGNORMDIST
description: Returns the cumulative natural log normal distribution of x, where LN(x) is normally distributed with the specified mean and standard deviation. Analyze data that has been logarithmically transformed with this function.

name: LOOKUP
description: Searches for a value and returns a value from the same location in a second area.

name: LOWER
description: Converts text to lower case letters.

name: MATCH
description: Returns the relative position of a specified item in a range.

name: MAX
description: Returns the maximum value, the greatest value, of all the values in the arguments.

name: MAXA
description: Returns the largest value in a list of arguments, including text and logical values.

name: MDETERM
description: Returns the matrix determinant of an array.

name: MDURATION
description: Calculates the modified Macauley duration of a security with an assumed par value of $100.

name: MEDIAN
description: Returns the median, the number in the middle of the provided set of numbers; that is, half the numbers have values that are greater than the median, and half have values that are less than the median.

name: MID
description: Returns the requested number of characters from a text string starting at the position you specify.

name: MIN
description: Returns the minimum value, the least value, of all the values in the arguments

name: MINA
description: Returns the minimum value in a list of arguments, including text and logical values.

name: MINUTE
description: Returns the minute corresponding to a specified time.

name: MINVERSE
description: Returns the inverse matrix for the matrix stored in an array.

name: MIRR
description: Returns the modified internal rate of return for a series of periodic cash flows.

name: MMULT
description: Returns the matrix product for two arrays.

name: MOD
description: Returns the remainder of a division operation.

name: MODE
description: Returns the most frequently occurring value in a set of data.

name: MONTH
description: Returns the month corresponding to the specified date value.

name: MROUND
description: Returns a number rounded to the desired multiple.

name: MULTINOMIAL
description: Calculates the ratio of the factorial of a sum of values to the product of factorials.

name: N
description: Returns a value converted to a number.

name: NA
description: Returns the error value #N/A that means not available.

name: NEGBINOMDIST
description: Returns the negative binomial distribution.

name: NETWORKDAYS
description: Returns the total number of complete working days between the start and end dates.

name: NOMINAL
description: Returns the nominal annual interest rate for a given effective rate and number of compounding periods per year.

name: NORMDIST
description: Returns the normal cumulative distribution for the specified mean and standard deviation.

name: NORMINV
description: Returns the inverse of the normal cumulative distribution for the given mean and standard deviation.

name: NORMSDIST
description: Returns the standard normal cumulative distribution function.

name: NORMSINV
description: Returns the inverse of the standard normal cumulative distribution. The distribution has a mean of zero and a standard deviation of one.

name: NOT
description: Reverses the logical value of its argument.

name: NOW
description: Returns the current date and time.

name: NPER
description: Returns the number of periods for an investment based on a present value, future value, periodic payments, and a specified interest rate.

name: NPV
description: Calculates the net present value of an investment by using a discount rate and a series of future payments and income.

name: OCT2BIN
description: Converts an octal number to a binary number.

name: OCT2DEC
description: Converts an octal number to a decimal number.

name: OCT2HEX
description: Converts an octal number to a hexadecimal number.

name: ODD
description: Rounds the specified value up to the nearest odd integer.

name: ODDFPRICE
description: Calculates the price per $100 face value of a security with an odd first period.

name: ODDFYIELD
description: Calculates the yield of a security with an odd first period.

name: ODDLPRICE
description: Calculates the price per $100 face value of a security with an odd last coupon period.

name: ODDLYIELD
description: Calculates the yield of a security with an odd last period.

name: OFFSET
description: Returns a reference to a range. The range is a specified number of rows and columns from a cell or range of cells. The function returns a single cell or a range of cells.

name: OR
description: Calculates logical OR. It returns TRUE if any of its arguments are true; otherwise, returns FALSE if all arguments are false.

name: PEARSON
description: Returns the Pearson product moment correlation coefficient, a dimensionless index between -1.0 to 1.0 inclusive indicative of the linear relationship of two data sets.

name: PERCENTILE
description: Returns the nth percentile of values in a range.

name: PERCENTRANK
description: Returns the rank of a value in a data set as a percentage of the data set.

name: PERMUT
description: Returns the number of possible permutations for a specified number of items.

name: PI
description: Returns PI as 3.1415926536.

name: PMT
description: Returns the payment amount for a loan given the present value, specified interest rate, and number of terms.

name: POISSON
description: Returns the Poisson distribution.

name: POWER
description: Raises the specified number to the specified power.

name: PPMT
description: Returns the amount of payment of principal for a loan given the present value, specified interest rate, and number of terms.

name: PRICE
description: Calculates the price per $100 face value of a periodic interest security

name: PRICEDISC
description: Returns the price per $100 face value of a discounted security.

name: PRICEMAT
description: Returns the price at maturity per $100 face value of a security that pays interest.

name: PROB
description: Returns the probability that values in a range are between two limits.

name: PRODUCT
description: Multiplies all the arguments and returns the product.

name: PV
description: Returns the present value of an investment based on the interest rate, number and amount of periodic payments, and future value. The present value is the total amount that a series of future payments is worth now.

name: QUARTILE
description: Returns which quartile (which quarter or 25 percent) of a data set a value is.

name: QUOTIENT
description: Returns the integer portion of a division. Use this to ignore the remainder of a division.

name: RADIANS
description: Converts the specified number from degrees to radians.

name: RAND
description: Returns an evenly distributed random number between 0 and 1.

name: RANDBETWEEN
description: Returns a random number between the numbers you specify.

name: RANK
description: Returns the rank of a number in a set of numbers. If you were to sort the set, the rank of the number would be its position in the list.

name: RATE
description: Returns the interest rate per period of an annuity.

name: RECEIVED
description: Returns the amount received at maturity for a fully invested security.

name: REPLACE
description: Replaces part of a text string with a different text string.

name: REPT
description: Repeats text a specified number of times.

name: RIGHT
description: Returns the specified rightmost characters from a text value.

name: ROMAN
description: Converts an arabic numeral to a roman numeral text equivalent.

name: ROUND
description: Rounds the specified value to the nearest number, using the specified number of decimal places.

name: ROUNDDOWN
description: Rounds the specified number down to the nearest number, using the specified number of decimal places.

name: ROUNDUP
description: Rounds the specified number up to the nearest number, using the specified number of decimal places.

name: ROW
description: Returns the number of a row from a reference.

name: ROWS
description: Returns the number of rows in an array.

name: RSQ
description: Returns the square of the Pearson product moment correlation coefficient (R-squared) through data points in known y’s and known x’s.

name: SEARCH
description: Finds one text string in another text string and returns the index of the starting position of the found text.

name: SECOND
description: Returns the seconds (0 to 59) value for a specified time.

name: SERIESSUM
description: Returns the sum of a power series.

name: SIGN
description: Returns the sign of a number or expression.

name: SIN
description: Returns the sine of the specified angle.

name: SINH
description: Returns the hyperbolic sine of the specified number.

name: SKEW
description: Returns the skewness of a distribution.

name: SLN
description: Returns the straight-line depreciation of an asset for one period.

name: SLOPE
description: Calculates the slope of a linear regression.

name: SMALL
description: Returns the nth smallest value in a data set, where n is specified.

name: SQRT
description: Returns the positive square root of the specified number.

name: SQRTPI
description: Returns the positive square root of a multiple of pi (p).

name: STANDARDIZE
description: Returns a normalized value from a distribution characterized by mean and standard deviation.

name: STDEV
description: Returns the standard deviation for a set of numbers.

name: STDEVA
description: Returns the standard deviation for a set of numbers, text, or logical values.

name: STDEVP
description: Returns the standard deviation for an entire specified population (of numeric values).

name: STDEVPA
description: Returns the standard deviation for an entire specified population, including text or logical values as well as numeric values.

name: STEYX
description: Returns the standard error of the predicted y value for each x. The standard error is a measure of the amount of error in the prediction of y for a value of x.

name: SUBSTITUTE
description: Substitutes a new string for specified characters in an existing string.

name: SUBTOTAL
description: Calculates a subtotal of a list of numbers using a specified built-in function.

name: SUM
description: Returns the sum of cells or range of cells.

name: SUMIF
description: Adds the cells using a given criteria.

name: SUMIFS
description: Adds the cells in a range using multiple criteria.

name: SUMPRODUCT
description: Returns the sum of products of cells. Multiplies corresponding components in the given arrays, and returns the sum of those products.

name: SUMSQ
description: Returns the sum of the squares of the arguments.

name: SUMX2MY2
description: Returns the sum of the difference of the squares of corresponding values in two arrays.

name: SUMX2PY2
description: Returns the sum of the sum of squares of corresponding values in two arrays.

name: SUMXMY2
description: Returns the sum of the square of the differences of corresponding values in two arrays.

name: SYD
description: Returns the sum-of-years’ digits depreciation of an asset for a specified period.

name: T
description: Returns the text in a specified cell.

name: TAN
description: Returns the tangent of the specified angle.

name: TANH
description: Returns the hyperbolic tangent of the specified number.

name: TBILLEQ
description: Returns the equivalent yield for a Treasury bill (or T-bill)

name: TBILLPRICE
description: Returns the price per $100 face value for a Treasury bill (or T-bill).

name: TBILLYIELD
description: Returns the yield for a Treasury bill (or T-bill).

name: TDIST
description: Returns the probability for the t-distribution.

name: TEXT
description: Formats a number and converts it to text.

name: TIME
description: Returns the decimal number for the specified time.

name: TIMEVALUE
description: Returns the decimal number of the time represented by a text string.

name: TINV
description: Returns the t-value of the student's t-distribution as a function of the probability and the degrees of freedom.

name: TODAY
description: Returns a serial number representing the current date

name: TRANSPOSE
description: Returns a vertical range of cells as a horizontal range or a horizontal range of cells as a vertical range.

name: TREND
description: Returns values along a linear trend. This function fits a straight line to the arrays known x and y values. Trend returns the y values along that line for the array of specified new x values.

name: TRIM
description: Removes extra spaces from a string and leaves single spaces between words.

name: TRIMMEAN
description: Returns the mean of a subset of data excluding the top and bottom data.

name: TRUE
description: Returns the value for logical TRUE.

name: TRUNC
description: Removes the specified fractional part of the specified number.

name: TTEST
description: Returns the probability associated with a t-test.

name: TYPE
description: Returns the type of value.

name: UPPER
description: Converts text to uppercase letters.

name: VALUE
description: Converts a text string that is a number to a numeric value.

name: VAR
description: Returns the variance based on a sample of a population, which uses only numeric values.

name: VARA
description: Returns the variance based on a sample of a population, which includes numeric, logical, or text values.

name: VARP
description: Returns variance based on the entire population, which uses only numeric values.

name: VARPA
description: Returns variance based on the entire population, which includes numeric, logical, or text values.

name: VDB
description: Returns the depreciation of an asset for any period you specify using the variable declining balance method.

name: VLOOKUP
description: Searches for a value in the leftmost column and returns a value in the same row from a column you specify.

name: WEEKDAY
description: Returns the number corresponding to the day of the week for a specified date.

name: WEEKNUM
description: Returns a number that indicates the week of the year numerically.

name: WEIBULL
description: Returns the two-parameter Weibull distribution, often used in reliability analysis.

name: WORKDAY
description: Returns the number of working days before or after the starting date.

name: XIRR
description: Calculates the internal rate of return for a schedule of cash flows that may not be periodic.

name: XNPV
description: Calculates the net present value for a schedule of cash flows that may not be periodic.

name: YEAR
description: Returns the year as an integer for a specified date.

name: YEARFRAC
description: Returns the fraction of the year represented by the number of whole days between the start and end dates.

name: YIELD
description: Calculates the yield on a security that pays periodic interest.

name: YIELDDISC
description: Calculates the annual yield for a discounted security.

name: YIELDMAT
description: Calculates the annual yield of a security that pays interest at maturity.

name: ZTEST
description: Returns the significance value of a z-test. The z-test generates a standard score for x with respect to the set of data and returns the two-tailed probability for the normal distribution.

name: ODATA
description: Returns the data from a table based on an OData path.

name: GETPARAM
description: Gets the value of a variable during the processing of a server-side command

name: TEXTJOIN
description: Combines the text from multiple strings, and includes the specified delimiter between each text value.

name: TEXTJOINIF
description: Concatenates range of text strings using a delimiter if a specific criteria is met.

name: LENB
description: Returns the number of bytes used to represent the characters in a text string.

name: FINDB
description: Finds the specified text string(1) within another text string(2) and returns the number of the starting position of the specified text string(1) from the first character of the another text string(2).

name: LEFTB
description: Returns the specified number of characters from the far left of a text string, based on the number of bytes you specify.

name: MIDB
description: Returns the requested number of characters from a text string starting at the position you have specified (on the basis of the specified number of bytes).

name: RIGHTB
description: Returns the specified rightmost characters from a text value on the basis of the number of bytes.

name: SEARCHB
description: Searches one text value within another and returns the text value’s position in the text you searched.

name: REPLACEB
description: Replaces part of a text string with a different text string (based on specified number of bytes).

name: GETURL
description: Get URL.

name: GETURLQUERYVALUE
description: Gets the value of the specified parameter value in the URL

name: XLOOKUP
description: Searches a range or an array, and then returns the item corresponding to the first match it finds. If no match exists, then return the closest (approximate) match.

name: XMATCH
description: Searches for a specified item in an array or range of cells, and then returns the item's relative position.

name: GETRESOURCESTRING
description: Get multilingual application resources

name: ACOT
description: Returns the arccotangent (inverse of the cotangent) of the specified numeric value.

name: ACOTH
description: Calculates the inverse hyperbolic cotangent of the specified numeric value.

name: ARABIC
description: Converts the specified Roman value to an Arabic value.

name: AREAS
description: Returns the number of areas in the specified reference.

name: BAHTTEXT
description: Converts the specified value to Thai text and adds a suffix "Baht" to it.

name: BASE
description: Converts a number into a text representation according to specified base.

name: BETA.DIST
description: Calculates the cumulative beta distribution function.

name: BETA.INV
description: Calculates the inverse of the cumulative beta density function.

name: BINOM.DIST
description: Calculates the individual term binomial distribution probability.

name: BINOM.DIST.RANGE
description: Calculates the probability of a trial result using binomial distribution.

name: BINOM.INV
description: Returns the criterion binomial, the smallest value for which the cumulative binomial distribution is greater than or equal to a criterion value.

name: BITAND
description: Calculates bitwise AND of the two specified values.

name: BITLSHIFT
description: Calculates the value shifted left by the specified number of bits.

name: BITOR
description: Calculates the bitwise OR of two specified numbers.

name: BITRSHIFT
description: Calculates the value shifted right by specified number of bits.

name: BITXOR
description: Returns bitwise XOR of the two specified numbers.

name: CEILING.MATH
description: Rounds a number up to the nearest integer or to the nearest multiple of significance.

name: CEILING.PRECISE
description: Rounds a number up to the nearest integer or to the nearest multiple of a specified value.

name: CHISQ.DIST
description: Calculates the chi-squared distribution.

name: CHISQ.DIST.RT
description: Calculates the right-tailed probability of the chi-squared distribution.

name: CHISQ.INV
description: Calculates the inverse of left-tailed probability of the chi-squared distribution.

name: CHISQ.INV.RT
description: Calculates the inverse of the right-tailed probability of the chi-squared distribution.

name: CHISQ.TEST
description: Calculates the test for independence from the chi-squared distribution.

name: COMBINA
description: Calculates the number of possible combinations (along with repetitions) for the specified number of items.

name: CONCAT
description: Joins the text fetched from multiple strings.

name: CONFIDENCE.NORM
description: Returns confidence interval for a population mean.

name: CONFIDENCE.T
description: Returns the confidence interval for a for a population mean.

name: COT
description: Returns the cotangent of the specified angle.

name: COTH
description: Returns the hyperbolic cotangent of the specified number.

name: COVARIANCE.P
description: Returns the population covariance, which is the average of the products of deviations for each data point pair in two sets of numbers.

name: COVARIANCE.S
description: Returns the sample covariance, which is the average of the products of deviations for each data point pair in two sets of numbers.

name: CSC
description: Returns the cosecant of the specified angle.

name: CSCH
description: Returns the hyperbolic cosecant of the specified angle.

name: DAYS
description: Calculates the number of days between two dates.

name: DECIMAL
description: Converts the text representation (of a number in specified base) into a decimal number.

name: ENCODEURL
description: Returns a URL encoded string.

name: ERF.PRECISE
description: Calculates the error function.

name: ERFC.PRECISE
description: Calculates the complementary ERF function integrated between a lower limit and infinity.

name: EXPON.DIST
description: Returns the exponential distribution or the probability density.

name: F.DIST
description: Calculates the F probability distribution, to see degrees of diversity between two sets of data.

name: F.DIST.RT
description: Calculates the F probability distribution, to see degrees of diversity between two sets of data.

name: F.INV
description: Returns the inverse of the F probability distribution.

name: F.INV.RT
description: Returns the inverse of the F probability distribution.

name: F.TEST
description: Returns the result of an F-test, which returns the one-tailed probability that the variances in two arrays are not significantly different.

name: FLOOR.MATH
description: Rounds a number down to the nearest multiple of the specified value.

name: FLOOR.PRECISE
description: Rounds a number down to the nearest multiple of a specified value or to the nearest integer.

name: FORMULATEXT
description: Returns a formula as a string.

name: GAMMA
description: Calculates the gamma function value.

name: GAMMA.DIST
description: Returns the gamma distribution.

name: GAMMA.INV
description: Returns the inverse of the gamma cumulative distribution.

name: GAMMALN.PRECISE
description: Returns the natural logarithm of the Gamma function, G(x).

name: GAUSS
description: Returns the probability (in the form of a numeric value) specifying that a member of a standard normal population will fall between the mean and specified standard deviations from the mean.

name: HYPGEOM.DIST
description: Returns the hypergeometric distribution.

name: IFNA
description: Calculates the specified value if the formula returns #N/A error, otherwise it returns the actual result of the formula.

name: IFS
description: Performs a comparison and returns the specified associated value if comparision is TRUE.

name: IMCOSH
description: Calculates the hyperbolic cosine of specified complex number.

name: IMCOT
description: Calculates the cotangent of specified complex number.

name: IMCSC
description: Calculates the cosecant of specified complex number.

name: IMCSCH
description: Calculates the hyperbolic cosecant of specified complex number.

name: IMSEC
description: Calculates the secant of specified complex number.

name: IMSECH
description: Calculates the hyperbolic secant of specified complex number.

name: IMSINH
description: Calculates the hyperbolic sine of specified complex number.

name: IMTAN
description: Calculates the tangent of specified complex number.

name: INDIRECT
description: Returns the reference specified by a text string.

name: ISFORMULA
description: Tests whether a value, an expression, or contents of a reference cell is a formula.

name: ISO.CEILING
description: Rounds a number up to the nearest integer or multiple of a specified value.

name: ISOWEEKNUM
description: Calculates the number ISO week number of the year for specified date.

name: LOGNORM.DIST
description: Returns the cumulative natural log normal distribution of x, where LN(x) is normally distributed with the specified mean and standard deviation. Analyze data that has been logarithmically transformed with this function.

name: LOGNORM.INV
description: Returns the inverse of the lognormal cumulative distribution function of x, where LN(x) is normally distributed with the specified mean and standard deviation.

name: MAXIFS
description: Returns the maximum value among the values in cells or the cell range provided the specified set of conditions or the criteria meets.

name: MINIFS
description: Returns the minimum value among the values in cells or the cell range provided the specified set of conditions or the criteria meets.

name: MODE.MULT
description: Returns a vertical array of the most frequently occurring value in a set of data.

name: MODE.SNGL
description: Returns the most frequently occurring value in a set of data.

name: MUNIT
description: The function returns the unit matrix for the specified dimension.

name: NEGBINOM.DIST
description: Returns the negative binomial distribution.

name: NETWORKDAYS.INTL
description: Returns the number of workdays between two dates using arguments to indicate holidays and weekend days.

name: NORM.DIST
description: Returns the normal distribution for the specified mean and standard deviation.

name: NORM.INV
description: Returns the inverse of the normal cumulative distribution for the given mean and standard deviation.

name: NORM.S.DIST
description: Returns the standard normal distribution function.

name: NORM.S.INV
description: Returns the inverse of the standard normal cumulative distribution. The distribution has a mean of zero and a standard deviation of one.

name: PDURATION
description: Returns the number of periods required by an investment to reach a specified value.

name: PERCENTILE.EXC
description: Returns the kth percentile of values in a range where k is between 0..1, exclusive.

name: PERCENTILE.INC
description: Returns the kth percentile of values in a range where k is between 0..1, inclusive.

name: PERCENTRANK.EXC
description: Returns the rank of a value in a data set as a percentage (0..1, exclusive) of the data set.

name: PERCENTRANK.INC
description: Returns the rank of a value in a data set as a percentage of the data set.

name: PERMUTATIONA
description: Calculates the number of permutations for the specified number of items (along with repetitions) that can be selected from the total items.

name: PHI
description: Calculates the value of the density function for the specified standard normal distribution.

name: POISSON.DIST
description: Returns the Poisson distribution.

name: QUARTILE.EXC
description: Returns the quartile (which quarter or 25 percent) of a data set based on percentile values from 0..1, exclusive.

name: QUARTILE.INC
description: Returns the quartile (which quarter or 25 percent) of a data set based on percentile values from 0..1, inclusive.

name: RANK.AVG
description: Returns the rank of a number in a set of numbers. If some values have the same rank, it will return the average rank.

name: RANK.EQ
description: Returns the rank of a number in a set of numbers. If you were to sort the set, the rank of the number would be its position in the list.

name: RRI
description: Returns calculated interest rate for growth of investment.

name: SEC
description: Returns the secant of the specified angle.

name: SECH
description: Returns the hyperbolic secant of the specified angle.

name: SKEW.P
description: Calculates the skewness of a distribution on the basis of population.

name: STDEV.P
description: Returns the standard deviation for an entire specified population (of numeric values).

name: STDEV.S
description: Returns standard deviation is estimated based on a sample(of numeric values).

name: SWITCH
description: Evaluates a list of values against a single value, and returns the result corresponding to the first matching value. If none of them match, an optional default value is returned.

name: T.DIST
description: Returns the t-distribution.

name: T.DIST.2T
description: Returns the two-tailed t-distribution.

name: T.DIST.RT
description: Returns the right-tailed t-distribution.

name: T.INV
description: Returns the left-tailed inverse of the t-distribution.

name: T.INV.2T
description: Returns the t-value of the student's t-distribution as a function of the probability and the degrees of freedom.

name: T.TEST
description: Returns the probability associated with a t-test.

name: UNICHAR
description: Returns the Unicode character specified by a number.

name: UNICODE
description: Returns the number (code) corresponding to first character of specified text.

name: VAR.P
description: Returns variance based on the entire population, which uses only numeric values.

name: VAR.S
description: Returns the variance based on a sample of a population, which uses only numeric values.

name: WEIBULL.DIST
description: Returns the two-parameter Weibull distribution, often used in reliability analysis.

name: WORKDAY.INTL
description: Returns the serial number of the date before or after a specified number of workdays with custom weekend parameters. These parameters indicate weekend days and holidays.

name: XOR
description: Returns a logical exclusive OR of all arguments.

name: Z.TEST
description: Returns the significance value of a z-test. The z-test generates a standard score for x with respect to the set of data and returns the two-tailed probability for the normal distribution.

name: ASC
description: Transforms full-width (double-byte) characters to half-width (single-byte) characters.

name: DBCS
description:
Transforms half-width (single-byte) characters to full-width (double-byte) characters. The name of the function (and the characters that it converts) depends upon your language settings.

For Japanese, this function changes half-width (single-byte) English letters or katakana within a character string to full-width (double-byte) characters.
